ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma- or whitespace-separated list of file extensions to open with code view. Leading dots optional. Reload Obsidian after changing.
ast.target: 以逗号或空格分隔的文件扩展名列表，用于以代码视图打开。前导点可选。更改后请重新加载 Obsidian。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Render a gutter with line numbers next to the code.
ast.target: 在代码旁渲染带有行号的行号栏。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Files above this size show a warning instead of rendering. Prism highlighting is expensive on very large files.
ast.target: 超过此大小的文件将显示警告而非渲染。Prism 高亮在非常大的文件上开销很大。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Code View: extension list changed. Reload Obsidian (Ctrl+R) to apply.
ast.target: 代码视图：扩展列表已更改。请重新加载 Obsidian (Ctrl+R) 以应用更改。
